blended.narrative: Grouse Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 996 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
